read.text: People have always wanted to discover new things and new worlds. We have built spaceships to go to other planets and are planning to visit other galaxies one day. Meanwhile, we know very little about our own planet. The oceans, which cover 70 percent of the planet, are an unknown world to us. The Pacific Ocean is the largest one. The lowest point on the Earth is also there. It is called Challenger Deep and it was discovered in 1875. The Pacific Ocean stretches from the Arctic Ocean to the coast of Antarctica, but most of its water is in the warm tropics, which makes it warm. A lot of fish and animals live in the Pacific Ocean. The place is still waiting for researchers to discover its secrets for us.

Without the energy from the Sun, the Earth would have no life at all. Nowadays everyone knows that the Sun is a star. Like all stars, the Sun is a great burning ball of gases. To us, it seems large and red. The other stars look white or light blue because they are much farther from us than the Sun. In the past, many people believed that the Earth was the centre of the universe. They thought that the Sun and the stars went round it. Only in 1543, a great Polish scientist published a book in which he tried to prove a different point of view. According to him, the Earth and the other planets moved round the Sun. Those people who supported the scientist were often imprisoned and even killed.

Since 2007 high-speed trains have become a common type of transport in Europe. They make it possible to cut travel times by hours. The trains travel at 350 kilometres an hour, and this is not the limit! The only problem for the engineers is the loud noise the trains produce. People living in the areas the trains travel through suffer from the noise greatly. For the passengers, the situation is different. For their comfort, all the carriages are made sound-proof from the inside. Travelling on high-speed trains is comfortable and pleasant. In the future, a high-speed railroad network could cover most of Europe. For example, a trip from Paris to Rome could take only 3 hours!

Studies of the atmosphere first received technical support in 1912. Equipment to measure temperature and pressure was invented in Germany. But the question was how to raise it high into the air. In 1921, Russian engineers suggested using planes. The special equipment was put on planes that made regular flights. Thanks to this, scientists got a lot of new information about the structure of the atmosphere. Nowadays scientists use modern flying laboratories to study the structure of clouds at different levels. Unlike the first planes, these laboratories can work in any weather and are able to predict climate changes.

Most people enjoy watching the night sky. And the brightest object in the sky is the Moon. Every night the Moon rises in the East and sets in the West. It takes about 27 days to go around the Earth, and it’s an interesting fact that we always see the same side of the Moon. The Moon is the closest object to the Earth. It would take us only thirteen hours to get to the Moon by rocket. If we were able to travel at the speed of light, it would take a bit less than two seconds. There is a very thin atmosphere on the Moon. Life is not possible there. In spite of this, the Moon can be used as a base for space exploration and even for space tourism. Some space companies are planning to take tourists to the Moon in the future.

The mobile phone has become an important part of our everyday life. We can’t imagine our lives without it now. Thanks to the mobile phone we can keep in contact with our relatives and friends at any time. We use them to text and to send emails, to share photos and videos. We can use the Internet and listen to music and do lots of other things. However, according to surveys, mobile phone users mostly spend their time on games and social networking. Around 80 percent of the world’s population has a mobile phone. The mobile phone industry is the fastest growing industry in the world. From 1983 to 2016, worldwide mobile phone subscriptions grew to over seven billion.

Table tennis is the third most played sport in the world after football and cricket. It is considered to be an indoor version of Lawn Tennis. However, they have a lot of differences. Table tennis has a different scoring system, a smaller ball, smaller rackets, and a smaller playing area. Modern table tennis was invented at the end of the 19 th century in England . Very soon the new sport became popular all over the world. In 1901, competitions with over 300 participants were already being held. According to numerous studies, table tennis has great effects on human health. It keeps the brain sharp and improves the player’s coordination.

A zoo, also known as a zoological park or a zoological garden, gives people the opportunity to watch animals from different continents. There are hundreds of zoos all over the world. However, most of them are located in major cities. The first zoo in Russia was opened in 1864, in Moscow. It was a small zoological garden. On the opening day, only 287 animals were on display. Nowadays, the Moscow Zoo is one of the largest in Europe. The unique collection of the Zoo includes over 10000 kinds of animals and birds. Scientists study the animals’ behaviour and reproduction. They also breed rare animals there to stop them dying out.

The first vacuum cleaner was designed in 1869. Since then, vacuum cleaners have changed a lot. Nowadays the robot vacuum cleaner is getting more and more popular. This device cleans a house automatically. Following a programme, the robot drives slowly around the house and makes it cleaner. It operates with brushes and a tube. The robot is so flexible that it can get under a table or sofa or reach dust in corners. Some advanced models can also wash floors of all kinds. These functions are provided by a complicated electronic system and sensors inside. The vacuum cleaner looks like a plate and can be kept in the corner. It is friendly to children and animals and works on electricity.

The Arctic Ocean is the smallest ocean of the world. It covers the northern polar region of the Earth. The Arctic region is a very cold place. The lowest recorded temperature there is minus 68 degrees. In spite of the cold, a lot of animals live on the Arctic ice. The polar bear is one of them. Now, due to global warming, the polar bear is in a serious trouble. The thing is that polar bears hunt seals and they need ice to do this. The bears wait for seals on the ice, hunt them in the water and go back to the shore. If the ice is too thin, it breaks under the bears’ heavy bodies and they may drown. The situation is getting worse and some researchers say the ocean may become ice-free as soon as 2050.

It’s hard to find a more popular Russian symbol than the traditional Russian doll, or Matryoshka. It is well-known all over the world. The first set of dolls appeared in Moscow in 1890. It consisted of eight dolls. All of them were children: seven girls, one boy, and a baby. In those times, Matryoshkas were not meant as toys for children as their price was very high. Mostly, adults bought them as presents or home decorations. There was a belief that if you put a note with a wish into Matryoshka, it would come true. At the beginning of the 20 th century, Russia started to export their national dolls abroad.

Great Britain is home to the world’s oldest school. The King’s School was established in 1567 and it is still open. It has a long history. Many famous people have been educated at this old school. Nowadays The King’s School is an independent secondary school for boys and girls. More than 800 pupils study at the school. Though The King’s School is located in old buildings, it has up-to-date technical equipment and provides a full modern education. The King’s School is also famous for its festival of music, drama and arts. It is held during the last week of the summer term and attracts a lot of people from different parts of the country.

Bicycles or bikes are an important means of transportation in many parts of the world. The first bicycles turned up in Europe in the first half of the 19 th century but the word “ bicycle ” only appeared later, in 1868. There are more bicycles in the world than cars. A lot of people have realized that cycling is an easy way to get around and a great way to cut down on pollution. More and more cities have special places where people can borrow a bike and ride around the city. Over the past few years, a bicycle infrastructure has been created in Moscow. Cycling in the centre of Moscow in summer is one of the most pleasant and quickest ways of seeing the city.

English is the third most-spoken language in the world after Chinese and Spanish. Over 840 million people speak English as a first or second language. It is an official language of sixty-seven countries. 80 percent of information stored on all computers in the world is in English. The vocabulary of the English language is the biggest in the world. A new word is added into English almost every two hours. The English language is said to be one of the happiest languages in the world. The word happy is used more often than the word sad ! That’s a good reason to learn this language, isn’t it?

Human activity creates waste. The problem isn’t new and space is no exception to the rule. Dead satellites, rocket stages and other things are littering our planet’s orbit. They are getting dangerously close to space stations and there is a great possibility of an accident. Space stations could be completely destroyed by the rubbish. In 1983, a tiny piece of paint from a satellite made a big hole in the side window of a spaceship. There is a great need to “clean up” space and to take away 3,000 tons of space rubbish. To solve the problem, scientists and engineers are designing special spaceships that will collect and recycle space rubbish.

The construction of the longest and the deepest railroad tunnel was finished in Europe. The tunnel runs through the Alps and links the north and south of Europe. The length of the tunnel is 57 kilometres. It runs straight from beginning to end. It will allow passenger trains to travel more quickly through the mountains. Modern technologies ensure safety and security when the trains go through the tunnel. The great project started in 2009 and it took 7 years to complete. It is considered to be one of the most amazing engineering constructions in Europe.

The rainforest can be described as a thick and very tall jungle. The term rain comes from the great quantity of water that these forests get throughout the year. The rainforests are the world’s greatest natural resources. They are called the lungs of our planet. Half of all the kinds of plants and animals that exist on the planet live in the rainforests. Unfortunately, the area with rainforests is being reduced due to global warming. 100 years ago, the rainforests covered 14 percent of the earth’s surface. Now, it is only 6 percent. Scientists say that if the process continues at this rate, the rainforests will have disappeared in forty years.

Global warming is a result of human activity. In 1985 there was a big conference in Austria where 89 climate researchers from different countries took part. After long discussions the scientists declared that the climate of the planet had changed. Indeed, it is warmer now than it was years ago. It can be clearly seen in the north. In the Arctic some places are ice-free now and polar bears have lost the place where they lived. The sea level has risen as well. The situation is getting more and more serious. Global warming is a great problem which needs to be solved in the near future.

Snowdon is the highest mountain in Wales. It is located in a national park. It stands at 1085 metres above sea level, and it is often described as the busiest mountain in Great Britain. Snowdon is very popular with tourists. If you are strong and brave enough to get to the top, you can enjoy wonderful views from there. On a clear day, you can see as far as Ireland! During the summer months there is a café at the top. There, tourists can get a welcome cup of tea, or soup if the weather is cold. If you feel too tired to walk back, you can always take the train down the mountain. The mountain railway was built in 1896. It is safe, and there have never been any accidents on this route.

Though most people believe that the tomato is a vegetable, this plant is actually a fruit. It is a fruit because it has seeds inside like apples, oranges, lemons, and all other types of fruit. The tomato comes from Central and South America. When tomatoes were brought to England, people thought that they were poisonous and refused to eat them. Only in 1820, Robert Johnson proved that tomatoes were absolutely safe and would not affect people’s health. He ate a basket of tomatoes in public. Nowadays, the tomato is widely used in all types of food. There are many different kinds of tomatoes – over 7,500! They differ in size, shape, colour and taste.

We don’t realize how lucky we are to have clean water whenever we want. A lot of people around the world do not have such an opportunity. Did you know that more than 750 million people on the Earth do not have clean water to drink? Meanwhile, a lot of water is wasted and polluted. In 1993 the World Day of Water was established. Nowadays a lot of special events are organized in different countries. Their aim is to make people understand how important clean water is for their health, environment and agriculture. Water is essential for our life. We should think about saving it, as the fresh water supplies are limited. We need to keep it clean for ourselves and for future generations.

In 1642 a French student invented the first mechanical calculator. He was only 18 and the counting machine was a present for his father. The father worked as a tax collector and the young man wanted to make his job easier. The talented inventor made several machines, but nobody was interested. The young man was ahead of his time. Many years passed before people realized how useful these machines could be and started mass producing them. Today most mechanical calculators have been replaced with electronic models. These small devices can perform a lot of mathematical operations. You just need to enter the numbers by pressing the keys and you’ll see the final result on the screen in no time.

Do you know why it is hot in the summer and cold in the winter? Most people believe that it is because the Earth is closer to the Sun in the summer and farther from it in the winter. But it is not like this at all! In fact, the distance between the Earth and the Sun is largest in July and smallest in January! Scientists suggest that the reason for different summer and winter temperatures is the angle of the Sun’s rays. In the summer, the rays reach the Earth almost at a right angle. Due to this, the rays are not spread out and a smaller area of the planet’s surface gets the energy. In the winter, the angle changes and the Sun’s rays are spread out over a larger area. Besides this, the long nights and short days do not give enough time for the land to warm up.

A robot is a machine that does work for people. The word “ robot ” appeared in the 1920s and it was first used in a science fiction story. In real life, the robot was invented later, in 1954. There are different kinds of robots which are used in different industries. Most of them are operated with the help of a computer program. Instead of humans, robots do hard and boring work in unpleasant or dangerous environments. They usually work faster and more accurately than people. They never get tired and do not make mistakes. Nowadays robots are often used for domestic needs – to clean houses or to look after sick and elderly people. Scientists say that soon robots will become a normal part of our life, like mobiles and computers today.

Venus is one of the hottest planets in the Solar system. The temperature on its surface is 482 degrees. This unfriendly place looks much the same as the Earth 4 billion years ago. Both planets were formed from the same gas cloud, but Venus lost most of its water and atmosphere. This happened because the planet turns very slowly. As a result, now it has no magnetic field to protect it from the Sun’s winds. The planet has turned into a lifeless desert. Most space modules that were sent to Venus could not work on the planet more than two hours. The acidic clouds and high pressure quickly made them absolutely useless.

We are always told that we should clean our teeth regularly to keep them healthy and to have fresh breath. It is believed that people started using a kind of paste to clean their teeth around 5000 years ago. However, the ingredients of these tooth powders were very different from ours. For example, the people of ancient Egypt used salt, mint, dried flowers and pepper to create tooth powder. Later, in the 18th century, in some countries in Europe, people brushed their teeth with burnt bread. The first toothpaste appeared in 1890, in Great Britain. At first it was sold in jars. Then special tubes were designed to make the toothpaste more comfortable to use.

The Channel Tunnel is a rail tunnel beneath the English Channel which links Great Britain and France. It is considered to be one of the most amazing engineering constructions in Europe. The second longest undersea tunnel in the world was opened in 1994. It is said that 13,000 workers and engineers participated in the construction project. The Channel Tunnel contains three tunnels. The south tunnel is for people who are travelling from France to the UK, the north tunnel takes passengers from the UK to France. Nowadays it takes 35 minutes to go from Paris to London in the Channel Tunnel. The third tunnel is a service tunnel. It is not used by passengers.

The word “ tsunami ” can be translated from Japanese as “ big wave ” . It describes a natural process that can be dangerous for people and their homes. Most of the huge waves appear after earthquakes. Most waves are born in the Indian and the Pacific Oceans where volcanoes are active. The mass of water rises from the bottom of the ocean and moves to the shore. It moves at a speed of a plane and can be up to 40 meters high. The wave is very powerful and dangerous. In 2004, a tsunami happened in the Indian Ocean. It was one of the most terrible natural disasters in history. Thousands of people were killed or went missing.

Wombats are exotic animals that only live in Australia. They have become an unofficial symbol of the country. In 1974 a wombat appeared on an Australian stamp for the first time. Since then it has been regularly used on different Australian stamps and coins. Wombats look like little bears and prefer grass to meat. They also love eating berries, plant roots and mushrooms. Like camels, wombats drink little water because there is enough water in fresh grass. Wombats spend most of their life in holes under the ground. With their strong arms and long nails they are able to dig very long and complex tunnels. Fortunately, wombats have few enemies in the animal world. Most wombats live around 15 years.

The Caspian Sea is one of the world’s natural wonders. It shares the characteristics of both a sea and a lake. In the past it was called a sea because of its great size and salty water. However, the Caspian Sea is listed as the largest lake in the world. There are about 130 rivers which bring their water to the Caspian Sea . But it is not a freshwater lake – its water is very salty. The Caspian Sea is famous for its wildlife. More than 850 kinds of animals can be found in this unique sea. The Caspian Sea region is also one of the oldest oil-producing areas in the world. It is also rich in other natural resources.

Nowadays solar energy is widely used as an alternative form of power. Solar panels transform the energy from the sun into electricity. The first plane that does not need fuel was constructed in France in 2015. It uses only the sun’s energy. The panels are placed on the huge wings of the plane. It doesn’t fly very fast. Solar energy can make the plane move at only 140 miles an hour. However, the plane is able to travel round the world. It is safe and can successfully cross areas of bad weather. In the future, engineers hope to construct a model that people can fly in. Our dream of environmentally friendly transport may come true very soon. Would you like to take a flight on the solar plane?

One day a young man who lived near the lake in a small American town asked himself, “Why can’t people ski on water if they can ski on snow?” With his brother’s help he constructed several models of skis to test his ideas. He experimented on the local lake for a few days and created skis suitable for the water. This happened in 1922. The young man, who was only 18 at that time, didn’t patent his invention. However, he performed a lot of shows across the country that made him and the sport of water skiing popular. Later, he was recognized as the creator of a new sport – water skiing. Water skiing equipment has been greatly improved since that time, and the number of people who enjoy this sport is growing in many countries.

The carrot is a root vegetable which consists mostly of water and sugar. The carrots that we eat today originated from the wild ones which grew in Europe and Asia. The vegetable tasted sweet and the people began to use it as food. There are two main types of carrots. There are eastern carrots that have dark purple roots and western carrots with orange roots. In fact, orange carrots first appeared in Europe in 1721. Dutch farmers selected orange carrots because orange is the colour of the Dutch Royal Family. Now orange carrots are widely grown all over the world. In modern households carrots are cooked and eaten in different ways. The vegetable is boiled, fried, baked and eaten raw. People also make juice from it.

Recycling is a technology that helps protect the environment and cut down on usage of raw materials. The steel, paper and glass industries recycle a lot. The largest recycler is the steel industry. It recovers more than 70 percent of its original materials. For example, since 1988 they have produced the majority of new metal cans from old ones. Metal parts for cars and planes are other examples of recycling steel. Fragments of waste glass are widely used in construction. For producing writing paper and pens, used packing boxes are an ideal material. They are cheap and easy to recycle. Nowadays more and more recycling centres are appearing in our towns and cities.

Oxford University is the oldest university in the English-speaking world. It is also the second oldest university in the world. The University of Oxford is believed to have started in 1133. It is located in Oxford City on the Thames River, not far from London. Oxford University is one of the world’s most impressive centres of education. There are students from different countries there. In fact, there is no building in Oxford called Oxford University. The University includes 38 colleges and related buildings. Over 22,000 students study English language and literature, geography, history, law, modern languages and other subjects there.

Our planet is the only planet in the Solar System where rainbows are possible. They are not visible in big cities, due to pollution and smog. But if you are travelling after rain has fallen in the countryside or walking on the beach, you have a good chance to see a rainbow. The rainbow is a multi-coloured arc which appears in the sky. When you see a rainbow, the sun is always behind you and it is raining in front of you. It is impossible to get to the end of the rainbow and to touch it. When you move, the rainbow moves too. We have always learned that rainbows have 7 colours. However, until the 17th century, people used to think there were only 5 colours in the rainbow.

The human brain is the most complex and remarkable organ of the body. It controls everything we do – thinking, learning, and even heart rate. Though the brain makes up only 2 percent of the body’s weight, it uses around 20 percent of its energy. It works 24 hours a day. Even when a person is sleeping, the brain is working hard to keep other organs functioning. Most people think that our brain is more active during the daytime because it needs to deal with a great amount of information. In fact, that’s not true. The brain is far more active when a person is sleeping! However, scientists don’t yet have any explanation for this fact.

Nowadays people can’t imagine their kitchen without a refrigerator. The first refrigerators appeared at the end of the 18th century. They looked different: they were just iceboxes. The refrigerators of the past were just wooden boxes, sometimes lined inside with metal. People put ice into the box and then placed the food inside to keep it cool. The refrigerator, similar to the one that we have now, was produced by General Electric in 1911, in France. It was very expensive. In those days, with the same money you could buy two cars. Today, in developed countries almost every family has enough money to buy a refrigerator for their kitchen. It’s hard to imagine how difficult and uncomfortable our lives would be without a refrigerator.

questions: How many days a week do you go to school?
What subjects are you good at?
What sports facilities do you have in your school?
What after-school activities does your school offer?
What do you like most about your school?
What would you recommend to a student who wants to improve his or her school results?
samples: I usually go to school five days a week, from Monday to Friday, and then I have the weekend off to rest.
I'm pretty good at maths and English, and I also do quite well in history because I find it really interesting.
We have a big sports hall, a football pitch outside, and a small gym with some exercise machines for older students.
My school offers a few clubs after lessons, like a drama club, a chess club, and a volleyball team that I sometimes join.
What I like most about my school is my classmates, because we're a really friendly group and we always help each other.

I would recommend making a clear study plan and revising a little every day instead of leaving everything until the last night. It also helps a lot to ask the teacher when you don't understand something.

questions: In what season do you have your birthday? How do you usually celebrate your birthday?
What is the best birthday present you have ever had?
What other holidays and special days are celebrated in your family?
What, from your point of view, is the best birthday present for a teenager?
samples: My birthday is in autumn, in October, and I usually celebrate it at home with a small party, a cake and my closest friends.
The best present I've ever had was a smartphone from my parents, because I had wanted one for a really long time.
In my family we also celebrate New Year, which is my favourite, and we mark March the eighth and Victory Day too.
From my point of view, the best birthday present for a teenager is something they can use every day, like good headphones or a gadget they really want.

questions: How old are you?
What is your favourite day of the week? Why do you like it?
When do you usually get up at weekends?
How do you usually spend your weekends?
What sport or hobby do you think you might like to try in the future?
What would you recommend to a student who wants to make his or her weekend more interesting?
samples: I'm fifteen years old, and I'll turn sixteen next year.
My favourite day of the week is Saturday, because I don't have to go to school and I can finally relax and meet my friends.
At weekends I usually get up quite late, at about ten o'clock, because I love sleeping in after a busy school week.
I usually spend my weekends hanging out with friends, watching films, and sometimes helping my parents around the house.
In the future I think I might like to try rock climbing, because it looks exciting and it's a great way to stay fit.

I would recommend trying a new hobby or planning a small trip somewhere, even just to a nearby park or museum. Spending time outside with friends instead of staying on your phone really makes the weekend more fun.

questions: How many days a week do you go to school?
When do you go to bed in the evening?
How do you spend your mornings?
What means of transport do you use to get to school?
What do you usually have for lunch?
What would you recommend to a teenager who wants to stay fit and healthy?
samples: I go to school five days a week, from Monday to Friday, and I'm usually free on Saturday and Sunday.
On school nights I go to bed at about half past ten, so I can get enough sleep before the next day.
In the mornings I get up, take a quick shower, have breakfast with my family, and then I get ready for school.
I usually go to school by bus, but when the weather is nice I sometimes walk because my school isn't very far away.
For lunch I usually have something simple like a sandwich, some soup, or pasta, and I always drink a bit of water or juice.
I would recommend eating more fruit and vegetables instead of fast food, and doing some exercise every day. Getting enough sleep is also really important if you want to stay fit and healthy.

questions: How many physical education lessons a week do you have?
What sports facilities do you have at school?
What do you do in your physical education lessons?
What sports do you do regularly?
Do you think the winter is a good season for doing sports or not? Why?
What would you recommend to a teenager who wants to stay fit and healthy?
samples: We have three physical education lessons a week, which I think is a good amount because I really enjoy them.
At school we have a large sports hall, a football pitch, and a running track outside where we do athletics.
In our PE lessons we usually play team games like basketball and volleyball, and sometimes we run or do exercises.
I do football regularly with my friends, and in winter I also like going swimming at the local pool.
I think winter is actually a good season for doing sports, because you can ski, skate and play ice hockey, which you can't do in summer.
I would recommend doing some kind of sport at least three times a week and eating healthy food instead of junk food. Drinking enough water and sleeping well also help you stay fit and full of energy.

questions: How many lessons of PE, physical education, do you have a week?
What sports facilities do you have in your school?
What sport do you do regularly?
What winter sports are popular with you and your friends?
Would you like to do any extreme sports? Why? Or why not?
What would you recommend to a teenager who wants to be healthy and fit?
samples: We have two PE lessons a week at my school, and honestly I wish we had a bit more because I really enjoy them.
In my school we have a big gym, a football field, and a tennis court that the older students can use.
I do swimming regularly because my parents take me to the pool twice a week, and I find it really relaxing.
The most popular winter sports with me and my friends are skiing and ice skating, and we love playing in the snow together.
Yes, I would love to try extreme sports like snowboarding, because I really enjoy the feeling of speed and adrenaline.

I would recommend doing sport regularly and eating a balanced diet with lots of fruit and vegetables. It's also important to sleep enough and spend time outdoors instead of sitting in front of a screen all day.

questions: What is your favorite season? Why do you like it?
There are a lot of different holidays during the year. What holidays are the most popular in Russia?
What is your favorite holiday? Why do you like it?
How do you usually celebrate your favorite holiday?
What season is the best for visiting the place where you live? Why?
What would you recommend to a person who has got a present he or she doesn't need?
samples: My favourite season is summer because the weather is warm and sunny, and I have long holidays when I can relax, travel and spend lots of time with my friends outside.
In Russia the most popular holidays are New Year, Victory Day on the ninth of May, the eighth of March and Defender of the Fatherland Day in February.
My favourite holiday is New Year because the whole family gets together, we decorate the tree, give each other presents and stay up late waiting for midnight.
I usually celebrate it at home with my family. We cook a big festive dinner, watch the president's speech, light fireworks outside and exchange gifts after the clock strikes twelve.
I think summer is the best season for visiting my town because everything is green, the parks are beautiful, and there are lots of festivals and outdoor activities to enjoy.
I would recommend that he or she give the present to someone who really needs it, like a friend or a relative, instead of just throwing it away.

questions: What is your favourite school subject?
What do you like to do in your free time?
What part-time job would you like to do during the school holidays, if any?
What career would you like to choose after finishing school? Why?
Do you think English will be useful for you in the future? In what way?
What would you recommend to a teenager who can't choose a career?
samples: My favourite school subject is English because I enjoy learning new words, watching films in the original and it is really useful for my future life.
In my free time I like meeting my friends, listening to music and playing computer games, and sometimes I read books or watch interesting videos online.
During the school holidays I would like to do a part-time job as a tutor for younger kids or maybe help out in a local cafe to earn some pocket money.
After finishing school I would like to become a programmer because I love computers and technology, and I think it is a creative and well-paid career.
Yes, I think English will be very useful for me because I will need it to travel, to study at university and to communicate with people from other countries.
I would recommend that he try different things, take an online career test and talk to people in jobs he finds interesting before making his final decision.

questions: How many lessons do you usually have?
What do you usually do after lessons?
How much time do you need to do your homework?
Who helps you to do your homework?
Do you use the internet when you do your homework? What for?
What would you recommend to a student who wants to spend less time on his or her homework?
samples: I usually have six or seven lessons a day, although on some days there are only five, depending on our school timetable.
After lessons I usually go home, have lunch and take a short rest, and then I do my homework or go to my sports club.
I usually need about two or three hours to do all my homework, but if there is a difficult subject like maths it can take even longer.
Usually I do my homework on my own, but when something is really difficult my mum or my older brother helps me to understand it.
Yes, I often use the internet for my homework. I look up information for projects, watch educational videos and check facts that I do not know.
I would recommend that he make a clear plan, switch off his phone while studying and focus on one subject at a time so he does not get distracted.

questions: What grade are you in?
How many school holidays do you have?
What school holidays do you like best of all?
Why do most teenagers enjoy school holidays so much?
What do you usually do during your summer holidays?
Do you think it is a good idea for a teenager to take a part-time job during the summer holidays? Why?
samples: I am in the ninth grade now, and this year is quite important because I have to prepare for my final exams.
We have four school holidays during the year, in autumn, in winter, in spring and the long summer holidays.
I like the summer holidays best of all because they are the longest and I have plenty of time to relax, travel and do whatever I want.
I think most teenagers enjoy school holidays so much because they can finally rest from studying, sleep longer, meet their friends and have lots of fun without homework.
During my summer holidays I usually go to my grandparents' village, spend time outdoors with my friends, swim in the river and read books for pleasure.
Yes, I think it is a good idea because a part-time job helps a teenager earn their own money, become more responsible and get useful experience for the future.

questions: What do you do in your physical education lessons at school?
Do you do your morning exercises or not? Why? What sports do you like playing?
What sports competitions do you enjoy watching?
Is there any sport you would like to play professionally? Why? What would you recommend to a teenager who wants to stay fit and healthy?
samples: In our physical education lessons we do warm-up exercises, run, play team games like basketball and volleyball, and sometimes we have lessons on the track outside.
Yes, I sometimes do my morning exercises because they help me wake up and feel energetic, and the sports I like playing most are football and badminton.
I really enjoy watching football and figure skating competitions on TV because they are exciting and the athletes are so talented and fun to support.

Yes, I would love to play football professionally because I am passionate about it, and I would recommend that a teenager who wants to stay fit do regular exercise, eat healthy food and get enough sleep.

questions: Who usually does the shopping in your family?
What can you buy in your nearest shopping centre?
How often do you usually go shopping?
Why are shopping centres so popular nowadays?
Why do some people hate shopping?
What time would you recommend that busy people should go shopping?
samples: In my family my mum usually does the shopping, but my dad and I often help her, especially when we need to carry heavy bags.
In my nearest shopping centre I can buy almost anything, like clothes, shoes, books, food and electronics, and there are also cafes and a cinema.
I usually go shopping about once a week with my family for food, but I buy clothes or other things only a few times a month.
I think shopping centres are so popular nowadays because you can find everything in one place, stay warm and dry, and also eat out or watch a film there.
Some people hate shopping because it can be tiring and time-consuming, the queues are long, and they simply prefer doing other things with their free time.
I would recommend that busy people go shopping early in the morning or late in the evening on weekdays, when there are fewer customers and shorter queues.

questions: How old were you when you got your mobile phone?
What do you use your mobile phone for, apart from talking?
Who do you usually send SMSs to?
How can you use mobile phones to learn foreign languages?
Where do you usually switch off your mobile phone?
Why are most teachers against using mobile phones in schools?
samples: I was about ten years old when I got my first mobile phone, because my parents wanted to be able to reach me after school.
Apart from talking, I use my phone to message my friends, listen to music, take photos and play games when I'm bored.
I usually send text messages to my close friends and my mum, mostly to tell her where I am or that I'll be home late.
You can use mobile phones to learn languages by downloading apps like Duolingo, watching videos in English, or looking up new words in a dictionary.
I usually switch off my mobile phone in the cinema and during lessons, because it would be rude to disturb other people.
I think most teachers are against mobile phones in schools because they distract students and stop them from concentrating on their lessons.

questions: What colour of clothes do you prefer wearing?
What clothes do you usually wear?
How often do you go shopping for clothes?
Who do you usually go shopping with?
Do you have to wear a school uniform? If so, what is it like?
Does a career as a fashion designer attract you or not? Why?
samples: I usually prefer wearing dark colours like black and blue, because they look stylish and go well with almost everything.
I usually wear comfortable clothes such as jeans, a T-shirt and trainers, especially when I'm just hanging out with friends.
I go shopping for clothes about once a month, usually when I need something new or when there are good sales.
I usually go shopping with my mum or my best friend, because they help me choose and give honest advice.
Yes, we have to wear a school uniform. It's a white shirt with dark trousers or a skirt, and it looks quite formal.
A career as a fashion designer doesn't really attract me, because I'm not very creative with drawing, although I do enjoy following fashion trends.

questions: How old were you when you learnt to read?
What do you like to read about?
Who is your favourite writer?
What do you usually do in literature lessons?
What do you like to do in your free time apart from reading?
What books do you prefer? Printed books or e-books? Why?
samples: I was around five or six years old when I learnt to read, and my grandmother helped me a lot with it.
I like to read about adventures and mysteries, and recently I've started enjoying science fiction stories about space and the future.
My favourite writer is J.K. Rowling, because I love how she created such a magical and detailed world in the Harry Potter books.
In literature lessons we usually read texts together, discuss the characters and the plot, and sometimes write essays about what we've read.
In my free time, apart from reading, I like to play football with my friends, watch films and spend time on my phone.
I prefer printed books because I love the smell and feel of paper, and looking at a screen for too long makes my eyes tired.

questions: Where do you prefer to get news from? Radio, newspapers, the internet, or some other source?
Who listens to the radio in your family?
What kind of TV programmes do you like to watch?
How often do you buy a newspaper or a magazine?
For what purposes do you use the internet?
samples: I prefer to get my news from the internet, because it's quick, free, and I can read about anything I want on my phone.
In my family, my dad usually listens to the radio, especially when he's driving to work in the morning.
I like to watch comedy shows and documentaries about animals and nature, because they are both fun and interesting to learn from.
I almost never buy a newspaper or a magazine, maybe a few times a year, because I read most things online instead.
I use the internet for studying, watching videos, chatting with my friends and listening to music in my free time.

questions: What is your best friend like?
Where did you and your friend meet for the first time?
How often do you see each other?
What do you like to do together?
What career is your best friend going to follow?
What would you recommend to a teenager who wants to be a good friend?
samples: My best friend is really kind and funny, and she's always there for me when I have a problem or feel sad.
My friend and I met for the first time in primary school, when we were sitting at the same desk in the first grade.
We see each other almost every day at school, and on weekends we often meet up to go for a walk or watch a film.
We like to do lots of things together, like listening to music, going shopping and just talking about everything for hours.
My best friend is going to follow a career in medicine, because she really wants to become a doctor and help people.
I would recommend that a teenager should always be honest and listen carefully to their friends. It's also important to support them in difficult moments and never share their secrets.

questions: What is your favourite animal? Why do you like it?
What pets are the most popular in Russia in your view?
Is it right for people to keep exotic animals as pets? Why?
What can people do to help homeless animals?
Why do you think most children like visiting zoos?
Does a career as a vet attract you or not? Why?
samples: My favourite animal is the dog, because dogs are loyal, friendly and they always make you feel happy when you're sad.
In my view, the most popular pets in Russia are cats and dogs, because they are easy to look after and very loving.
I don't think it's right for people to keep exotic animals as pets, because these animals need special conditions and really belong in the wild.
People can help homeless animals by giving them food, taking them to shelters, or even adopting one and giving it a real home.
I think most children like visiting zoos because they can see amazing animals from all over the world that they would never meet in real life.
A career as a vet does attract me, because I love animals and I would feel proud helping sick ones get better, even though it can be a difficult job.

questions: What is your favourite fruit?
What do you usually have for breakfast?
Where do you usually have lunch on weekdays?
Is there any food you do not like?
What dishes can you cook?
What food would you recommend to a teenager who wants to be healthy?
samples: My favourite fruit is the mango because it's really sweet and juicy, and I love its bright orange colour.
For breakfast I usually have a bowl of oatmeal with some berries, and a cup of tea to wake me up.
On weekdays I usually have lunch in the school canteen with my classmates, because it's close and quite cheap.
Yes, there is. I really don't like mushrooms because I don't enjoy their texture, they feel a bit slimy to me.
I can cook a few simple dishes, like scrambled eggs, pasta with tomato sauce, and pancakes for the weekend.
I would recommend eating more fresh vegetables and fruit instead of fast food. I'd also suggest drinking water rather than fizzy drinks, because that really helps your body stay strong and healthy.

questions: How many TV sets are there in your house?
Who watches most TV in your family?
How much time a day do you spend watching TV?
What kind of TV programs do you like?
Would you like to take part in a TV show, for example in a quiz show? Why does a career on TV attract you or not?
Why?
samples: There are two TV sets in our house, one in the living room and a smaller one in my parents' bedroom.
I think my dad watches the most TV in our family, because he loves football matches and the news in the evening.
I usually spend about one or two hours a day watching TV, mostly after I finish my homework.
I really like comedy shows and documentaries about animals and nature, because they are both fun and interesting.
Yes, I would love to take part in a quiz show, it would be so exciting to test my knowledge in front of an audience.
A career on TV attracts me because I'd meet lots of interesting people and it would never be boring.

questions: How old were you when you started using the computer?
In what lessons at school do you use computers?
What do you use your computer for?
What do the members of your family use computers for?
Which jobs need good computer skills in your view?
In what way have computers made people's life easier?
samples: I think I was about six years old when I started using the computer, mostly to play simple games with my brother.
We use computers in computer science lessons, of course, and sometimes in English and biology for projects and presentations.
I use my computer mainly for studying, watching videos, and chatting with my friends online in the evening.
My parents use computers for their work and online shopping, and my little sister uses them for cartoons and games.
In my view, jobs like programmers, designers, engineers and journalists all need good computer skills these days.
Computers have made life easier because we can find any information in seconds and talk to people all over the world instantly.

questions: When did you get your first mobile phone?
What do you usually use your mobile phone for?
How do you feel when you forget your mobile phone at home?
Do you think it's right that mobile phones are not allowed in some schools?
In what places would you recommend people switch off or turn down their phones? Why?
samples: I got my first mobile phone when I was about ten, when I started travelling to school on my own.
I usually use my mobile phone for texting friends, listening to music, and looking things up for my homework.
When I forget my phone at home I feel quite nervous and a bit lost, because I can't reach my parents or friends.
I think it's right, actually, because phones can distract students during lessons and stop them from concentrating properly.
I would recommend people switch off their phones in libraries, cinemas and hospitals. In those places a ringing phone really disturbs other people and shows a lack of respect.

questions: Where is your hometown located? What is your hometown famous for?
What is your favourite place in your hometown?
Why do you like it?
What environmental problems do you have in your hometown, if any? Is it better to live in the country or in the city?
Why? What would you like to improve in your hometown to make it a better place to live?
samples: My hometown is located in central Russia, near a big river, and it's famous for its old churches and beautiful parks.
My favourite place in my hometown is the central park by the river, where I often go for a walk.
I like it because it's very peaceful and green, and I can relax there with my friends or read a book.

The main environmental problem we have is air pollution from cars and a bit of litter in the streets. In my opinion it's better to live in the city, because there are more opportunities for study and entertainment.

I prefer the city because there is always something to do and good schools nearby. To make my hometown better, I'd like to add more parks, recycling bins and bike lanes so it would be cleaner and greener.

plan: what your typical school day is like
what your favourite subject is, and why
what you like most about your school
what your attitude to your school life is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about my school. Firstly, my typical school day is quite busy. I usually get up at seven o'clock, and lessons start at half past eight. We have six or seven lessons every day, and after that I often stay for clubs or do my homework. My favourite subject is English, because I love learning new words and I think it will be useful for my future. Also, I really like our school because the teachers are friendly and there is a big library where I can read and relax. For example, when I have free time between lessons, I often go there with my friends. However, sometimes I get tired because the days are long. All in all, I have a positive attitude to my school life, because school is not only about studying but also about meeting friends and growing up. That's why I think these are some of the best years of my life.

plan: · why teenagers can have a conflict with their friends
· what you usually have conflicts with your friends about
· how you usually make up with your friends
· what your attitude to conflicts with your friends is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about conflicts with your friends. Firstly, I think teenagers can have a conflict with their friends because they are different people with different opinions, and sometimes they are just tired or stressed at school. Also, jealousy and misunderstandings can easily start an argument. Usually, I have conflicts with my friends about small things, for example when we can't decide which film to watch or where to go at the weekend. Sometimes we argue because someone forgets a promise. However, I don't like staying angry for a long time. To make up with my friends, I usually talk to them honestly and say sorry if I was wrong, because friendship is more important than being right. Sometimes I just send a funny message and we laugh about it. As for my attitude, I think conflicts are normal and not always bad, because they help us understand each other better. To sum up, conflicts happen to everyone, but real friends always find a way to make up.

plan: when you have school holidays
what school holidays you would make longer, and why
what you enjoy doing during your school holidays
what your attitude to school holidays is

native.t: I just want to make sure you enjoy studying at our language school and that everything's fine.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about my school holidays. In Russia, we have school holidays four times a year. Firstly, there are short holidays in autumn, winter and spring, and then we have a long summer holiday from June to August. If I could change something, I would make the spring holidays longer, because in spring the weather is nice and I feel tired after a hard term. Also, I would love more time to relax before the final exams. During my holidays I enjoy doing many things. For example, I like meeting my friends, riding my bike and watching films at home. In summer I usually visit my grandparents in the village, which is always fun. I also try to read books that I have no time for during the school year. As for my attitude, I think holidays are really important because they help us rest and recover our energy. However, after a long break I sometimes miss my classmates and even my lessons. All in all, school holidays are my favourite time of the year, and I always look forward to them.

plan: why people like travelling in Russia
what means of transport is the most popular for travelling in Russia, and why
what places in Russia you would like to visit
what your attitude to travelling is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about music. Firstly, music is very important for teenagers because it helps us to relax, to express our feelings and to forget about our problems. When I am sad, music cheers me up, and when I am happy, it makes my mood even better. As for me, I prefer pop and rock music, because these styles are energetic and the lyrics are often about things that are close to me. I also like listening to film soundtracks. Many teenagers today not only listen to music but also learn to play musical instruments, for example the guitar or the piano. I think it is a great idea, because playing an instrument develops your talent and patience. My attitude to music lessons at school is positive, because they help us to learn about different composers and styles. However, I think we should also study modern music, not only classical. To sum up, music makes our life brighter, and I can't imagine a single day without it.

plan: · why it is important for people to have a hobby
· what your hobby is and how long you have been doing it
· how much time a week you give to your hobby and why
· what your attitude to creative hobbies is

native.t: But I don't have much time for this hobby yet.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about hobbies. Firstly, I think it is very important for people to have a hobby, because it helps us relax after a hard day and forget about our problems. A hobby also makes our life more interesting and helps us find new friends. As for me, my hobby is drawing, and I have been doing it for about five years. I usually give my hobby around six or seven hours a week, mostly at the weekend, because during the school week I am very busy with my studies. For example, on Sundays I can draw for two or three hours without stopping. I really enjoy creative hobbies because they help us express our feelings and develop our imagination. However, some people think creative hobbies are a waste of time, but I completely disagree. All in all, I believe everyone should have a hobby, especially a creative one, because it makes us happier and more interesting people.

plan: whether reading is popular with teenagers, and why, or why not
what kind of books you like reading
why many people prefer e-books to paper books
what your attitude to reading is

native.t: I think that's why many people prefer to stay in a big city

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about reading books. Firstly, I think reading is not very popular with many teenagers today, because they prefer to spend their free time on phones, games and social media. However, some teenagers still love reading, and I am one of them. I personally enjoy reading fantasy and adventure books, because they take me to another world and let me use my imagination. I also like detective stories because they are exciting. Nowadays many people prefer e-books to paper books, because e-books are cheaper, you can carry hundreds of them on one device, and you can read in the dark. For example, my friend has a whole library on her phone. However, some people still love the smell and feel of paper books. As for my attitude, I think reading is a wonderful hobby because it makes us smarter and improves our vocabulary. To sum up, reading is really useful, and I hope more teenagers will discover how interesting books can be.

plan: why most people enjoy travelling
what people like doing while travelling
what place you would like to go to, and why
what your attitude to travelling is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about travelling. Firstly, most people enjoy travelling because it gives them a chance to relax and forget about their daily problems. Travelling also helps us discover new countries, meet interesting people and learn about other cultures. While travelling, people like doing different things. For example, some of them visit museums and old castles, while others prefer lying on the beach or trying local food. I think tasting new dishes is one of the best parts of any trip. As for me, I would really like to go to Italy, because I am interested in its history and art. Also, I have heard that Italian pizza and ice cream are amazing, so I would love to try them. My attitude to travelling is very positive, because it makes our life brighter and more exciting. However, travelling can be quite expensive, that's why I don't do it as often as I would like. All in all, I am sure that travelling is one of the most wonderful things in the world, and I hope to visit many countries in the future.

plan: why doing sport is very important for modern teenagers
what else besides sport young people do to keep fit
what you enjoy doing in your free time
what your attitude to doing sports activities is

native.t: And what else do you do when you have free time? Do you enjoy cooking or assembling puzzles?

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about pets. Firstly, many people keep pets because animals are good friends and they make us feel less lonely. Pets also teach us to be kind and responsible, because we have to feed them and take care of them. The most popular pets in my country are cats and dogs, but some people also keep hamsters, parrots and fish. As for me, I have a cat, and I love her very much. Looking after a pet is not always easy. For example, you have to feed it on time, clean up after it, play with it and take it to the vet when it is ill. A dog also needs walks every day. However, I think all this work is worth it, because pets give us so much love and joy. My attitude to keeping pets is very positive, but I believe people should only get a pet if they are ready to take care of it properly. To sum up, pets are wonderful companions, and life with them is much happier.

plan: · why family plays an important role in every person’s life
· what a typical Russian family is like
· who you feel closest to in your family and why
· what your attitude to having a big family is

native.t: Personally, I watch it every time I feel sad or disappointed. It just lifts up my mood.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about family. Firstly, I think family plays a very important role in every person's life, because our family is always there to support us and help us when we have problems. We learn our first lessons and values from our parents. As for a typical Russian family, it usually has two parents and one or two children, and often grandparents help to look after the kids. In my family, I feel closest to my mum, because I can tell her everything and she always understands me. For example, when I am upset, she is the first person I talk to. Also, I think having a big family is wonderful, because there are always many people around you and you never feel lonely. However, a big family needs a lot of money and patience. All in all, family is the most important thing in our life, and I am very lucky to have such a caring family.

plan: what wild animals live in your region
whether it is a good idea to keep a wild animal as a pet, and why
why people build zoos in cities and towns
what your attitude to zoos is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about animals. Firstly, in my region there are many wild animals, for example foxes, hares, wolves and different kinds of birds. We also have squirrels in the parks. I don't think it is a good idea to keep a wild animal as a pet, because wild animals need a lot of space and freedom, and they can be dangerous. Also, it is hard to give them the right food and care at home. People build zoos in cities and towns because they want to show animals from other countries and teach children about nature. Zoos also help to protect rare animals that could disappear. However, my attitude to zoos is a little mixed. On the one hand, I like that zoos save endangered animals, but on the other hand, I feel sorry for animals in small cages. That's why I prefer modern zoos with big natural areas. To sum up, animals are an important part of our world, and we should treat them with respect and care.

plan: · what your typical school day is like
· what subjects at school you find most useful for your future, and why
· what you are going to do when you leave school
what your attitude to school life is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about my school. My typical school day is usually quite busy. Firstly, I get up early, have breakfast and go to school, where I have about six or seven lessons every day. After classes I sometimes stay for extra activities or go home to do my homework. As for subjects, I find English and Maths the most useful for my future, because I want to work with computers and travel abroad one day. English helps me communicate with people from other countries, and Maths develops my logical thinking. When I leave school, I am going to enter a university and study to become a programmer. Also, I would like to learn another foreign language, for example Spanish. My attitude to school life is generally positive, because I have many friends here and our teachers are kind and helpful. However, sometimes I feel tired because we get too much homework. All in all, I think school is an important part of my life, and these are years I will always remember.

plan: what your weekday is like
what you like about your school most of all
whether you prefer classroom learning or online learning, and why
what your attitude to your school life is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about computer games. Firstly, computer games are very popular with teenagers today because they are exciting, modern and a good way to relax after school. Also, with online games you can play with your friends even when they are far away. As for me, I enjoy playing computer games, but only in my free time and not for too long. I prefer adventure and strategy games, because they make me think and use my imagination. People have different opinions about computer games. Some think they are useful because they develop quick reactions, logic and even English. However, others believe games are a waste of time and bad for our health if we play too much. My attitude is somewhere in the middle. I think computer games are fine if you control your time and don't forget about studies, sport and real friends. To sum up, computer games can be both fun and useful, but we should always keep a healthy balance.

plan: · why many people enjoy shopping
· who you like shopping with and why
· what you like and dislike shopping for
· what your attitude to online shopping is

native.t: I know many people say that they enjoy spending time outdoors

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about shopping. Firstly, I think many people enjoy shopping because it helps them relax and feel happy when they buy something new. Shopping can also be a nice way to spend free time with other people. As for me, I like shopping with my mum, because she gives me good advice and helps me choose the best things. Also, it is more fun to shop together than alone. I really enjoy shopping for clothes and books, but I dislike shopping for food, because it is boring and the shops are often very crowded. As for online shopping, I think it is very convenient because you can buy almost anything without leaving your home. However, sometimes the things look different from the photos, so you have to be careful. All in all, I believe shopping is a useful and pleasant part of our life, and online shopping makes it even easier.

plan: why a lot of young people do sports nowadays
what sports clubs and teams there are in your school
what you do to keep fit
what your attitude to doing sports activities is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about sports. Firstly, a lot of young people do sports nowadays because they want to be healthy, strong and full of energy. Also, sport helps them to make new friends and to relax after school. In my school there are several sports clubs and teams, for example a football team, a volleyball team and an athletics club. We also have a fitness room. To keep fit, I do morning exercises, I go jogging in the park and sometimes I ride my bike with my friends. I also try to walk more instead of taking the bus. As for my attitude, I really love doing sports activities because they make me feel happy and confident. However, I think it is important not to be lazy and to train regularly. For example, even fifteen minutes a day can help a lot. To sum up, sport is great for both our body and our mood, and that's why I will always do it.

plan: · why people worry about environmental problems nowadays
· what the most serious environmental problem in the place where you live is
· what young people can do to improve the ecological situation
· what your attitude to environmental problems is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about environmental problems. Nowadays people worry about the environment a lot, because our planet is in real danger. Firstly, the air, water and soil are getting more and more polluted, and this is bad for our health. Also, many animals and plants are disappearing because of human activity. In the place where I live, I think the most serious problem is air pollution, because there are too many cars and factories in my city. However, young people can do a lot to improve the situation. For example, we can recycle paper and plastic, save water and electricity, and plant trees in our area. We can also take part in clean-up days and tell other people about these problems. As for my attitude, I am really worried about the environment, because it is our common home. That's why I always try to throw rubbish in special bins and turn off the lights when I leave a room. All in all, I believe that if everybody helps a little, we can make our planet a cleaner and safer place.

plan: why most people like travelling
which season is the best for travelling in your opinion
what means of transport is the best for travelling, and why
what your attitude to travelling is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about shopping. Firstly, shopping is a part of our everyday life, but people have different attitudes to it. Some people love shopping and see it as a hobby, while others find it boring and tiring. As for me, I quite like shopping, especially for clothes and books, but I don't like long queues. Nowadays many people prefer shopping online to going to ordinary shops. There are good reasons for this. Online you can compare prices, read reviews and buy things at any time without leaving home. Also, the goods are often cheaper. However, in real shops you can try things on and see the quality with your own eyes. My attitude to shopping as a way to spend free time is mixed. On the one hand, going to a shopping centre with friends can be fun. On the other hand, I don't think we should spend all our money and free time shopping. To sum up, shopping is necessary and sometimes enjoyable, but it is better to do it wisely.

plan: what you like about your school most of all
how many lessons a day you usually have
what school subjects you have chosen for your exams, and why
what your attitude to the number of subjects you have to learn is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about my school. Firstly, what I like most about my school is the friendly atmosphere, because the teachers are kind and my classmates are always ready to help. It feels like a second home to me. Usually we have six or seven lessons a day, which keeps us quite busy from morning until the afternoon. For my exams, I have chosen English and social studies, because English will be useful for my future career and I find social studies really interesting. Also, I think these subjects are not too difficult for me. However, I sometimes feel that we have to learn too many subjects at the same time. For example, it is hard to do well in maths, history and physics all in one week. That's why I think students should be able to choose more of their subjects. All in all, I really enjoy my school, even though studying so many subjects can be tiring.

plan: whether you have a lot of free time, and why, or why not
what you enjoy doing in your free time
what your Sunday afternoons are like
what your attitude to planning your free time is

native.t: And what else do you do when you have free time? Do you enjoy cooking or assembling puzzles?

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about my free time. Firstly, I don't have a lot of free time on weekdays, because I am very busy with school, homework and extra lessons. However, at the weekend I have much more time to relax. In my free time I enjoy meeting my friends, listening to music and watching films. I also like drawing because it helps me to calm down. My Sunday afternoons are usually quite lazy and pleasant. For example, I sleep a little longer, then I go for a walk or play computer games, and in the evening I get ready for school. Sometimes my family and I have lunch together. As for planning my free time, I think it is a good idea, because when you plan, you don't waste your day doing nothing. However, sometimes it is nice to be spontaneous. To sum up, free time is really important for everyone, because it helps us to rest and to do what we love.

plan: · what kinds of films modern teenagers enjoy
· where you prefer watching films: on TV, on the Internet or in the cinema, and why
· what film you have seen recently, what it was about
· what your attitude to watching films as a way to spend your free time is

native.t: a short interview and share their opinions about films and cinema.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about films. Firstly, modern teenagers enjoy many kinds of films. For example, a lot of my friends love action films and fantasy films, while others prefer comedies because they help us relax and laugh. I personally like both action and science fiction films. As for watching films, I prefer using the Internet, because it is cheap and I can watch a film whenever I want and stop it any time. However, sometimes I go to the cinema with my friends for big new films, because the screen and the sound there are amazing. Recently I saw a film about a young boy who got special powers and had to save his city. It was very exciting and the special effects were great. My attitude to watching films as a way to spend free time is very positive. I think films are not only fun but also useful, because they can teach us important things and even help us learn English. All in all, watching films is one of my favourite hobbies, and I can't imagine my free time without them.

plan: · why it is important for a teenager to have pocket money
· how much pocket money a week you usually get
· what you spend your pocket money on and why
· what your attitude to earning pocket money is

native.t: Plus, I can't make myself pay for a ticket and spend that much money on snacks

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about foreign languages. Firstly, learning foreign languages is very important nowadays because it opens many doors for us. With a foreign language you can travel more easily, make friends from other countries and get a better job in the future. The most popular foreign language in my country is English, and a lot of people also learn German, French or Chinese. As for me, I study English at school, and I really enjoy it. To learn a language well, I think you should practise it every day. For example, I watch films in English, listen to songs, learn new words and try to speak as much as possible. It is also useful to read books and chat with foreigners online. My attitude to learning languages is very positive, because it makes us smarter and helps us understand other cultures. However, I think it takes a lot of time and patience. To sum up, knowing foreign languages is a great advantage, and I will definitely continue learning English.

plan: how long it takes you to do your homework
what subject you usually start with, and why
whether schoolchildren should be given more or less homework, and why
what your attitude to school homework is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about school homework. Firstly, doing my homework usually takes me about two or three hours every evening, depending on how many lessons we had. As for which subject I start with, I usually begin with maths, because it is the most difficult for me and I want to do it while my mind is still fresh. After that, the easier subjects feel quick and relaxing. In my opinion, schoolchildren should be given less homework, because we already spend many hours at school and we also need time to rest and see our friends. For example, after a long day it is hard to concentrate in the evening. However, I understand that some homework is necessary to practise what we have learned. All in all, my attitude to homework is mixed, because it helps us study better, but too much of it makes us tired and stressed. That's why I think a balance is the best solution.

plan: why people spend time watching TV
what most teenagers prefer: watching TV or browsing the Internet, and why
whether there is a TV programme you really like
what your attitude to watching TV as a way to spend your free time is

native.t: so you learn very quickly how to spend your free time alone without feeling bored.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about TV. Firstly, people spend time watching TV because they want to relax, have fun and learn something new. Also, TV is an easy way to spend time when you are tired. However, I think most teenagers today prefer browsing the Internet to watching TV, because the Internet lets them choose what they want and watch it at any time. For example, my friends prefer YouTube and social media to ordinary TV channels. As for me, there is a TV programme I really like. It is a quiz show about science and history, because it is interesting and I learn new facts. I also enjoy watching it with my family. My attitude to watching TV as a way to spend free time is quite positive, but only in small amounts. However, I think it is bad to watch TV for many hours, because it is not good for our eyes and health. To sum up, TV can be useful and fun, but we should not forget about other activities.

plan: whether watching TV is a popular pastime with teenagers, and why, or why not
how many hours a week you watch TV
what TV programme is the most popular within your family
what your attitude to TV is

native.t: And how many hours do you spend online per week?

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about TV. Firstly, I think watching TV is not very popular with teenagers today, and there is a clear reason for it. Most young people prefer the Internet, smartphones and social media, because there they can choose exactly what they want to watch at any time. As for me, I don't watch TV very much. I think I watch it for about three or four hours a week, usually in the evening when I want to relax. In my family the most popular TV programme is a quiz show, because we like watching it all together and trying to answer the questions before the players do. It is always fun and sometimes we even argue about the answers. My attitude to TV is quite positive, however I think we should not watch it too much. For example, watching TV for hours is bad for our eyes and takes away time we could spend outside. All in all, I believe TV can be useful and entertaining, but only if we watch it in reasonable amounts.

plan: what you like most about your school
what weekday you find the most difficult, and why
what you would like to change in your school life
what your attitude to your school life is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about the weather and seasons. Firstly, there are four seasons in my country: winter, spring, summer and autumn, and each of them is beautiful in its own way. The weather can be very different, from hot sunny days in summer to cold and snowy days in winter. As for me, my favourite season is summer, because the weather is warm, the days are long and we have a long holiday. In summer I can swim, ride my bike and spend a lot of time outdoors with my friends. However, I also like winter because of the snow and the New Year holidays. The weather often influences my mood and plans. For example, when it is sunny, I feel happy and want to go for a walk, but when it is rainy, I prefer to stay at home and read a book. My attitude to our climate is generally positive, although sometimes the winter is too long. To sum up, every season has its own charm, and I enjoy the changes in nature throughout the year.

plan: why lots of people learn foreign languages nowadays
why you have chosen to do the English exam this year
what you did to prepare for your English exam
what your attitude to learning foreign languages is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about learning foreign languages. Firstly, lots of people learn foreign languages nowadays because the world has become smaller and we often need to communicate with people from other countries. Knowing a language also helps you travel and find a better job. As for me, I have chosen to do the English exam this year because English is the most popular language in the world and I really enjoy studying it. To prepare for my exam, I read books, watched films with subtitles and practised speaking with my teacher every week. For example, I learned a lot of new words by listening to English songs. Also, I did many practice tests to feel more confident. In my opinion, learning foreign languages is very important and useful, because it opens new opportunities and helps us understand other cultures. However, it takes a lot of time and patience. All in all, I love learning languages, and I hope to learn one more in the future.

plan: · why a healthy lifestyle is popular nowadays
· what you do to keep fit
· what sports activities are popular with teenagers in your region
· what your attitude to a healthy lifestyle is
