monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about keeping fit. Firstly, a healthy lifestyle is very popular nowadays because people understand that health is the most important thing we have. Also, there is a lot of information about it on the Internet and social media, so more people want to look and feel good. To keep fit, I try to eat healthy food, drink a lot of water and do morning exercises. I also go for a walk every day and try to sleep enough. In my region, popular sports activities with teenagers are football, basketball, swimming and riding bikes. For example, many of my friends go to the gym or to dance classes. As for my attitude, I really support a healthy lifestyle, because it gives us energy and helps us to study better. However, I think we should not be too strict with ourselves and sometimes we can enjoy a treat. To sum up, keeping fit is a great habit, and I believe everyone should take care of their health.

plan: why today’s teenagers use the Internet so much
how the Internet makes long-distance communication easier
what dangers teenagers can face when they use the Internet
what your attitude to the Internet is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about the Internet. Firstly, today's teenagers use the Internet so much because it is a part of our everyday life. We use it for studying, finding information, listening to music, playing games and chatting with friends. The Internet also makes long-distance communication much easier. For example, I can talk to my cousin who lives in another city using video calls, and it feels like she is right next to me. We can also send messages and photos in just a second, which is really convenient. However, teenagers can face some dangers when they use the Internet. For example, there are people who try to cheat others, and sometimes we can see information that is not true or not suitable for us. That's why we should be careful and never share personal information with strangers. As for my attitude, I think the Internet is a great invention, because it gives us so many opportunities. However, we should not spend all our free time online and forget about real life. All in all, the Internet is very useful, but we have to use it wisely and safely.

plan: what people need friends for
how long you and your friend have known each other
what you enjoy doing together
what your attitude to friendship is

native.t: when they can play with each other and be good friends and enjoy each other's company.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about food. Firstly, food is very important in our life, not only because we need it to live, but also because it brings people together. As for me, my favourite food is Italian, especially pizza and pasta, because it is tasty and easy to cook. I also like fruit and sweets, but I try not to eat too many of them. Nowadays many people pay attention to healthy eating. They eat more vegetables, fruit and fish, and try to avoid fast food and sugar. I think it is a very good tendency, because healthy food gives us energy and keeps us fit. In my family we usually cook at home, and I really like it, because home-made food is fresher and healthier than fast food. Sometimes I help my mum to cook dinner. My attitude to healthy eating is positive, but I believe we can sometimes enjoy our favourite treats too. To sum up, food is one of the pleasures of life, and it is important to eat tasty but also healthy meals.

plan: what your city, town or village is famous for
what your favourite place in your city, town or village is, and why you like it
whether you are going to stay in your city, town or village after leaving school or move to another place, and why
what your attitude to your city, town or village is

native.t: I live in a big city, but I wish I could move to the countryside.

monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about the place where I live. Firstly, my town is famous for its beautiful old buildings and a lovely river that runs through the centre. Many tourists come here in summer to see them. My favourite place in my town is the central park, because it is quiet and green, and I can walk there with my friends or just relax after school. For example, in autumn the trees turn yellow and red, and it looks really wonderful. As for the future, I think I will move to a bigger city after leaving school, because I want to study at a good university and find an interesting job. However, I will definitely come back to visit my family and friends. All in all, I have a very warm attitude to my town, because this is the place where I grew up and where my best memories are. That's why it will always be special to me.

plan: · why it is important to share the household chores in a family
· how household chores are divided in your family
· what household chores you like and dislike doing and why
· what your attitude to ignoring household chores is
monologue.sample: I'd like to tell you about household chores. Firstly, I think it is very important to share the household chores in a family, because when everyone helps, the work is done faster and nobody feels tired or angry. Also, it teaches children to be responsible. In my family, the household chores are divided quite fairly. For example, my mum usually cooks, my dad does the shopping and repairs things, and I clean my room and wash the dishes. My little sister waters the plants. There are some chores I like and some I dislike. I like cooking because it is creative, but I really dislike taking out the rubbish and cleaning the bathroom, because it is boring. As for my attitude, I think ignoring household chores is a bad idea, because then the home becomes messy and other people have to do extra work. That's why I always try to do my part. To sum up, sharing chores makes family life easier and happier, and everyone should help at home.
